name: Corny Mini-Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Corn oil or light vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 425°F. Grease three mini-muffin tins.
In a medium bowl, combine the cornmeal, flour, sugar,
baking powder, baking soda and salt; stir until just
combined. Make a well in the center of the mixture,
set aside.
In a small bowl, beat the egg, buttermilk and oil;
pour into the well, add the cooled corn kernels and
stir until just combined.
Note: The original recipe text contained errors such as "flowur" instead of "flour", missing measurements for some ingredients, and unclear instructions. The rewritten version corrects these issues while maintaining the exact title and following the specified formatting rules.
